name: acf/route-map-panel
title: Route Map Panel
description: An illustrated map with a pin for each location. Clicking a route line shows that route's prices.
icon: <svg width='24px' height='24px' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path d='M12 21s7-6.5 7-12a7 7 0 1 0-14 0c0 5.5 7 12 7 12Z' stroke='#000' stroke-width='2' stroke-linejoin='round'/><circle cx='12' cy='9' r='2.5' stroke='#000' stroke-width='2'/></svg>
